scenes.chapter_title: The Butter Knife and the Flamingo
scenes.title: The Defiant Toaster

location_master.name: Adèle's Kitchen
location_master.visual_style_modifiers: small cluttered third-floor apartment kitchen, cozy and worn, drafty window, retro appliances, french style details

scene_world_state.environmental_lighting: Dim amber tones, soft overhead lamp casting high-contrast shadows (chiaroscuro), warm table glow, drafty dark window pane
scene_world_state.atmospheric_effects: Subtle kitchen steam, cold draft blowing from the window

character_manifest.costume_and_appearance_variant: Adèle in casual home clothes, a cozy knit beige sweater, round glasses, messy bun

scenes.camera_shot: Medium-close overhead shot of Adèle's hands, focused on the metal butter knife unscrewing a screw on the side of a chrome toaster.
scenes.core_action: Adèle carefully unscrewing the side of a toaster with a butter knife on the kitchen table.
scenes.summary: Adèle (CHARACTER_A) spends a quiet Tuesday evening in her drafty third-floor apartment meticulously trying to disassemble and repair her broken toaster using a butter knife. She relies on her patience and logic, seeking quiet order in a manual task.
anecdotes: Has had a history of fixing things around the house with whatever cutlery is at hand.

scenes.chapter_title: The Butter Knife and the Flamingo
scenes.title: A Neon Knock

location_master.name: Adèle's Doorstep
location_master.visual_style_modifiers: narrow apartment hallway corridor, peeling paint on walls, generic brown wooden front door, small door number plaque

scene_world_state.environmental_lighting: Harsh yellow overhead corridor light, casting long vertical shadows down the hallway

character_manifest.costume_and_appearance_variant: Adèle in casual home clothes, a cozy knit beige sweater, round glasses, messy bun
Thomas in a slightly crumpled corduroy jacket, green beanie, and dark jeans

scenes.camera_shot: Wide shot from inside the hallway looking toward the open front door, capturing the scale of the neon-green flamingo next to Thomas.
scenes.core_action: Thomas standing at the doorway leaning casually against the doorframe, holding a giant dyed green flamingo.
scenes.summary: A loud, energetic knock shatters the apartment's quiet. Adèle opens the door to find her brother Thomas (CHARACTER_B) standing there. He is holding a giant, neon-green flamingo and acting completely casual about it.
anecdotes: Thomas has a reputation for showing up unannounced with bizarre items.

scenes.chapter_title: The Butter Knife and the Flamingo
scenes.title: The Tub Negotiation

location_master.name: Adèle's Bathroom
location_master.visual_style_modifiers: small vintage bathroom, retro checkered tile floor, white porcelain bathtub, chrome pipes, frosted window

scene_world_state.environmental_lighting: Single warm bulb overhead, soft yellow illumination reflecting on tiles
scene_world_state.atmospheric_effects: Slight damp/cool air, quiet porcelain stillness

character_manifest.costume_and_appearance_variant: Adèle in casual home clothes, a cozy knit beige sweater, round glasses, messy bun
Thomas in a slightly crumpled corduroy jacket, green beanie, and dark jeans

scenes.camera_shot: Medium over-the-shoulder shot from Adèle's perspective, looking at Thomas as he points to the white bathroom tub.
scenes.core_action: Thomas pointing enthusiastically to the empty bathtub, pleading with Adèle to let the bird stay.
scenes.summary: Thomas claims his plumbing is broken and pleads to keep the flamingo in her tub. Too tired to argue with his fast-paced banter and jokes, Adèle points him to the bathroom and returns to her kitchen.
anecdotes: Adèle defaults to quiet retreat when dealing with Thomas's exhausting energy.

scenes.title: Corn and Clicking

location_master.name: Adèle's Bathroom
location_master.visual_style_modifiers: small vintage bathroom, retro checkered tile floor, white porcelain bathtub, chrome pipes, frosted window

scene_world_state.environmental_lighting: Single warm bulb overhead, soft yellow illumination reflecting on tiles
scene_world_state.atmospheric_effects: Slight damp/cool air, quiet porcelain stillness

character_manifest.costume_and_appearance_variant: Adèle in casual home clothes, a cozy knit beige sweater, round glasses, messy bun
Thomas in a slightly crumpled corduroy jacket, green beanie, and dark jeans

scenes.camera_shot: Low angle close-up shot of dry corn kernels in a palm, with a blurry green bird beak in the foreground.
scenes.core_action: Thomas sitting on the edge of the tub, feeding dried corn to the neon-green flamingo.
scenes.summary: Ten minutes later, Adèle hears clicking sounds from the bathroom and goes to investigate. She finds Thomas sitting next to the tub feeding dried corn to the bird.
anecdotes: Thomas has always been bad at hiding his secrets for more than ten minutes.

scenes.title: Real, Live, and Neon-Green

location_master.name: Adèle's Bathroom
location_master.visual_style_modifiers: small vintage bathroom, retro checkered tile floor, white porcelain bathtub, chrome pipes, frosted window

scene_world_state.environmental_lighting: Single warm bulb overhead, soft yellow illumination reflecting on tiles
scene_world_state.atmospheric_effects: Slight damp/cool air, quiet porcelain stillness

character_manifest.costume_and_appearance_variant: Adèle in casual home clothes, a cozy knit beige sweater, round glasses, messy bun
Thomas in a slightly crumpled corduroy jacket, green beanie, and dark jeans

scenes.camera_shot: Medium-wide profile shot capturing Adèle's widening eyes as the flamingo turns its head and blinks.
scenes.core_action: Adèle staring in disbelief at the flamingo as it makes a soft sound, realizing it is alive.
scenes.summary: Adèle realizes the bird is alive, not plastic. Thomas admits he rescued it from a bankrupt roadside zoo. Adèle is stunned by the sheer impulsiveness of the act, which mirrors his reckless nature.
anecdotes: Thomas operates entirely on instinct, often rescuing things or animals on a whim.

scenes.title: The Landlord's 'Parrot'

location_master.name: Adèle's Bathroom
location_master.visual_style_modifiers: small vintage bathroom, retro checkered tile floor, white porcelain bathtub, chrome pipes, frosted window

scene_world_state.environmental_lighting: Single warm bulb overhead, soft yellow illumination reflecting on tiles
scene_world_state.atmospheric_effects: Slight damp/cool air, quiet porcelain stillness

character_manifest.costume_and_appearance_variant: Adèle in casual home clothes, a cozy knit beige sweater, round glasses, messy bun
Thomas in a slightly crumpled corduroy jacket, green beanie, and dark jeans

scenes.camera_shot: High angle shot looking down at Adèle sitting on the patterned bathmat, laughing with her head tilted back.
scenes.core_action: Adèle sitting on the floor laughing, while Thomas explains the landlord thinks it's a parrot.
scenes.summary: Thomas warns her Mrs. Gable must not know, as he told her it was just a large parrot. Surrendering to the absurdity of the situation, Adèle abandons her toaster and sits down on the bathmat.
anecdotes: Mrs. Gable has very poor eyesight but a very strict policy on pets.

scenes.title: Pizza on the Bathmat

location_master.name: Adèle's Bathroom
location_master.visual_style_modifiers: small vintage bathroom, retro checkered tile floor, white porcelain bathtub, chrome pipes, frosted window

scene_world_state.environmental_lighting: Single warm bulb overhead, casting soft golden ambient glows over the floor
scene_world_state.atmospheric_effects: Cozy shared room feel, quiet apartment hum

character_manifest.costume_and_appearance_variant: Adèle in casual home clothes, a cozy knit beige sweater, round glasses, messy bun
Thomas in a slightly crumpled corduroy jacket, green beanie, and dark jeans

scenes.camera_shot: Wide overhead shot of the bathroom floor, showing Adèle and Thomas sitting on opposite sides of a grease-stained pizza box.
scenes.core_action: Adèle and Thomas sharing slices of cold pizza on the floor next to the bathtub.
scenes.summary: Sharing cold pizza on the bathroom floor, the siblings look at the green flamingo and feel a sense of camaraderie, recalling their long history of shared disasters and childhood games.
anecdotes: They used to share cold pizza on the floor of their childhood room in Lyon.

scenes.title: The Haircut Incident

location_master.name: Adèle's Bathroom
location_master.visual_style_modifiers: small vintage bathroom, retro checkered tile floor, white porcelain bathtub, chrome pipes, frosted window

scene_world_state.environmental_lighting: Single warm bulb overhead, soft yellow illumination reflecting on tiles
scene_world_state.atmospheric_effects: Cozy shared room feel, quiet apartment hum

character_manifest.costume_and_appearance_variant: Adèle in casual home clothes, a cozy knit beige sweater, round glasses, messy bun
Thomas in a slightly crumpled corduroy jacket, green beanie, and dark jeans

scenes.camera_shot: Medium shot focused on Thomas playfully pointing at Adèle's face, with a pair of kitchen shears lying on the sink counter behind him.
scenes.core_action: Thomas gesturing dramatically as he complains about the haircut, while Adèle smiles dryly.
scenes.summary: They joke about the 'Haircut Incident' where Adèle's kitchen shears forced Thomas to wear a beanie for a month. Thomas acts dramatic about it while Adèle points out it was statistically his fault.
anecdotes: The beanie was bright red and he lost it within two weeks anyway.

scenes.title: The Stairwell Sofa and Haunted Radiator

location_master.name: Adèle's Bathroom
location_master.visual_style_modifiers: small vintage bathroom, retro checkered tile floor, white porcelain bathtub, chrome pipes, frosted window

scene_world_state.environmental_lighting: Warm, dim orange glow of the radiator reflecting off bathroom tiles
scene_world_state.atmospheric_effects: Hiss and clank of the old radiator

character_manifest.costume_and_appearance_variant: Adèle in casual home clothes, a cozy knit beige sweater, round glasses, messy bun
Thomas in a slightly crumpled corduroy jacket, green beanie, and dark jeans

scenes.camera_shot: Extreme close-up of a few copper pennies in a hand, lit by the warm, dim orange glow of a radiator.
scenes.core_action: Thomas showing the pennies he pocketed from the 'haunted' radiator offerings, smiling mischievously.
scenes.summary: They reminisce about blocking the stairs with a sofa and Thomas pocketing the offerings left for the fake ghost child near the radiator. They bond over their different ways of reacting to life.
anecdotes: Thomas bought candy with the offering pennies and split it with Adèle.

scenes.title: The Microwave Mimic

location_master.name: Adèle's Kitchen
location_master.visual_style_modifiers: small cluttered third-floor apartment kitchen, cozy and worn, drafty window, retro appliances, french style details

scene_world_state.environmental_lighting: Dim kitchen lights, green digital glow of the microwave timer, dark window

character_manifest.costume_and_appearance_variant: Adèle in casual home clothes, a cozy knit beige sweater, round glasses, messy bun
Thomas in a slightly crumpled corduroy jacket, green beanie, and dark jeans

scenes.camera_shot: Medium-close shot of the flamingo's open beak next to the digital glow of the microwave timer, with Thomas holding a treat.
scenes.core_action: Thomas mimicking microwave beeps while the green flamingo tries to copy the sound.
scenes.summary: To pass the time, they teach the green flamingo to mimic the beep of Adèle's microwave. The mimicry is so good it drives the neighbor's dog into a barking frenzy.
anecdotes: The neighbor's dog is named Napoleon and barks at anything that beeps.

scenes.title: 2:00 AM Departure

location_master.name: Adèle's Living Room
location_master.visual_style_modifiers: cramped cozy living room, worn fabric armchair, bookshelves, wooden floorboards

scene_world_state.environmental_lighting: Single floor lamp casting low ambient warm light, cool white light coming from the hallway door
scene_world_state.atmospheric_effects: Sudden cold night air from the doorway

character_manifest.costume_and_appearance_variant: Adèle in casual home clothes, a cozy knit beige sweater, round glasses, messy bun
Thomas in a slightly crumpled corduroy jacket, green beanie, and dark jeans

scenes.camera_shot: Wide shot from the dark living room looking towards the open front door, with Thomas and the green silhouette of the bird silhouetted against the hallway light.
scenes.core_action: Thomas carrying the green flamingo and a pizza box as he exits into the hallway at 2:00 AM.
scenes.summary: At 2:00 AM, Thomas gathers the bird and the empty pizza box. He leaves the apartment, stepping back out into the night and leaving Adèle alone in the sudden silence.
anecdotes: Thomas always leaves as quickly as he arrives, leaving a vacuum of energy.

scenes.title: Corn in the Cabinet

location_master.name: Adèle's Kitchen
location_master.visual_style_modifiers: small cluttered third-floor apartment kitchen, cozy and worn, drafty window, retro appliances, french style details

scene_world_state.environmental_lighting: Warm glowing table lamp, deep shadows in the rest of the kitchen, dark window
scene_world_state.atmospheric_effects: Quiet silence of the early morning

character_manifest.costume_and_appearance_variant: Adèle in casual home clothes, a cozy knit beige sweater, round glasses, messy bun

scenes.camera_shot: Close-up shot of the interior of Adèle's wooden kitchen cabinet, highlighting a plastic bag filled with yellow dried corn kernels.
scenes.core_action: Adèle placing a bag of dried corn in the cabinet, smiling quietly in the empty apartment.
scenes.summary: Adèle is left alone with her broken toaster. Instead of feeling frustrated, she smiles and puts a bag of dried corn in her cabinet — a quiet sign of accepting her brother's presence.
anecdotes: She bought the corn earlier just in case he returns with the bird.
